name: Sweet Pickled Beaver
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry white wine or apple juice
Juice and grated rind of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beaver thoroughly with salt water, then soak overnight in enough cold water to cover, adding 1/2 cup vinegar and 1 tablespoon salt.
2. The next day, remove the beaver from the brine, wash and cover with a solution of 2 teaspoons soda to 2 quarts of water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Drain and rinse the beaver, then place it in a clean pot. Add water just to cover. Sprinkle mixed pickling spice on top, bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Drain and rinse the beaver, pat dry and place in a roaster. Mix mustard, spices, sugar, wine and fruit juices and spread over the beaver.
5. Cover and roast at 325 degrees F until tender, basting frequently.
